overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person walk through Night City's downtown district at night. The player moves from an open crosswalk into covered walkways and neon-lit tunnels, then transitions to sprinting along multi-lane streets with heavy futuristic traffic and towering holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk starting from the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing pedestrians waiting at the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing at the crosswalk waiting to cross the street
individual walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with XING painted on the surface
large holographic advertisement display with prominent pink neon graphics
vertical digital billboard showing a hand image with yellow text
dark asphalt road with red painted lane markings and vehicle traffic
gray concrete pavement with yellow tactile paving strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban crosswalk with bold yellow stripes. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk past pedestrians waiting at the intersection, with large holographic billboards illuminating the scene in pink neon. Vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red pavement

events.description: enters covered walkway with distinctive red flooring and overhead shelter

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway with red pavement, passing planters and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera in the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing shelter over the pedestrian path
distinctive red colored walkway surface different from the gray sidewalk
large rectangular planter containing green shrubs and foliage
red automated vending kiosk with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive red pavement. The overhead structure blocks most of the sky, creating a more enclosed atmosphere. The player passes a red vending machine and large planters with bushes while a pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel underpass with cyan neon lighting

events.description: enters tunnel underpass with bright cyan overhead fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the tunnel underpass with bright cyan lighting, observing vehicles passing on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the tunnel with headlights on

entered.detail: concrete tunnel ceiling with continuous bright cyan fluorescent tube lighting
rough textured concrete walls of the underpass with advertisements
large neon sign with pink text reading WET DREAM and additional smaller text
metal safety railing with yellow and black stripes separating walkway from road

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow enclosed tunnel with striking cyan overhead lighting. Concrete walls display neon advertisements including a prominent pink 'WET DREAM' sign. The player walks along the sidewalk separated from the road by a metal railing as futuristic vehicles pass by with their headlights cutting through the artificial glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with heavy neon signage

events.description: exits tunnel into open street with tall buildings and heavy neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street sidewalk, observing the neon-lit buildings and moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: purple sports car with glowing accents driving along the street

entered.detail: tall building facade decorated with large glowing pink circular lights arranged vertically
green neon sign for a commercial establishment
elevated roadway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide downtown street lined with towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. A distinctive building with large pink circular lights dominates the right side. The player continues walking along the sidewalk as vehicles including a purple sports car drive past on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner looking up at skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera upward to gaze at the towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

entered.detail: immensely tall skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows reaching into the night sky
dark night sky visible between the towering buildings

segments.scene_description: The player stops walking and tilts the camera upward to admire the immense scale of the surrounding skyscrapers. The view emphasizes the verticality of the city, with countless illuminated windows and neon strips climbing into the dark sky. The street level temporarily exits the frame as the camera focuses on the architectural grandeur above.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with dense neon advertising

events.description: accelerates to high speed sprinting along the street

agents.ego_description: sprinting at high speed along the multi-lane street, weaving through heavy futuristic traffic with motion blur

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving alongside the player
black sedan passing by at high speed with headlights blazing

entered.detail: large bright pink neon sign reading JACKED AND COKE on building facade
floating holographic advertisement displaying animated graphics above the roadway

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level and accelerates rapidly, sprinting through the neon-lit canyon of downtown. The player moves at high speed past dense traffic including red sports cars and black sedans, with neon signs like 'JACKED AND COKE' flashing by. Holographic billboards hover above the wet reflective asphalt as the player navigates the bustling multi-lane arterial road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched metropolis, moving from an open urban intersection into enclosed corridors before accelerating through a towering downtown canyon. It begins at a futuristic crosswalk illuminated by pink holographic billboards, transitioning smoothly into a covered pedestrian walkway with red pavement and an enclosed atmosphere. The scene then shifts into a narrow tunnel defined by cyan overhead lighting and glowing advertisements before opening back up into a wide street dominated by massive buildings and pink circular lights. After a brief pause to tilt the camera upward toward the immense scale of the surrounding skyscrapers, the perspective returns to street level and accelerates into a rapid sprint. The movement concludes with a high-speed dash past dense futuristic traffic and flashing neon signs over wet, reflective asphalt.
